member.name: T:SimpleAuth.Conformance.Tests.AuthorizationEndpointConformanceTests
member.summary: OIDC Conformance: Authorization Endpoint (OAuth 2.1 §4.1, OIDC Core §3.1.2) Tests the authorize endpoint behavior including PKCE, error responses, and redirect validation.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Conformance.Tests.AuthorizationEndpointConformanceTests.#ctor(SimpleAuth.Conformance.Tests.ConformanceFixture)
member.summary: OIDC Conformance: Authorization Endpoint (OAuth 2.1 §4.1, OIDC Core §3.1.2) Tests the authorize endpoint behavior including PKCE, error responses, and redirect validation.

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.Conformance.Tests.ConformanceCollection
member.summary: xUnit collection that shares a single across all test classes. This avoids starting a new TestServer for every test class (faster execution).

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.Conformance.Tests.ConformanceFixture
member.summary: Shared test server factory used by all conformance test classes. Configures a server with multiple client types to cover the full OIDC surface.

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.Conformance.Tests.TestClaimsEnricher
member.summary: Test claims enricher providing profile and email claims.

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.Conformance.Tests.DiscoveryConformanceTests
member.summary: OIDC Conformance: Discovery (RFC 8414 / OIDC Discovery 1.0) Validates that the server metadata document is complete, correctly structured, and contains all required fields per the specifications.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Conformance.Tests.DiscoveryConformanceTests.#ctor(SimpleAuth.Conformance.Tests.ConformanceFixture)
member.summary: OIDC Conformance: Discovery (RFC 8414 / OIDC Discovery 1.0) Validates that the server metadata document is complete, correctly structured, and contains all required fields per the specifications.

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.Conformance.Tests.DPopParConformanceTests
member.summary: OIDC Conformance: DPoP (RFC 9449) and PAR (RFC 9126) Tests Demonstrating Proof of Possession and Pushed Authorization Requests.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Conformance.Tests.DPopParConformanceTests.#ctor(SimpleAuth.Conformance.Tests.ConformanceFixture)
member.summary: OIDC Conformance: DPoP (RFC 9449) and PAR (RFC 9126) Tests Demonstrating Proof of Possession and Pushed Authorization Requests.

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.Conformance.Tests.IdTokenConformanceTests
member.summary: OIDC Conformance: ID Token Validation (OIDC Core §3.1.3.7) Validates structure, claims, and signing of ID tokens.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Conformance.Tests.IdTokenConformanceTests.#ctor(SimpleAuth.Conformance.Tests.ConformanceFixture)
member.summary: OIDC Conformance: ID Token Validation (OIDC Core §3.1.3.7) Validates structure, claims, and signing of ID tokens.

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.Conformance.Tests.RefreshTokenConformanceTests
member.summary: OIDC Conformance: Refresh Token (OAuth 2.1 §6, RFC 6749 §6) Tests refresh token issuance, rotation, revocation, and error handling.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Conformance.Tests.RefreshTokenConformanceTests.#ctor(SimpleAuth.Conformance.Tests.ConformanceFixture)
member.summary: OIDC Conformance: Refresh Token (OAuth 2.1 §6, RFC 6749 §6) Tests refresh token issuance, rotation, revocation, and error handling.

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.Conformance.Tests.RevocationIntrospectionConformanceTests
member.summary: OIDC Conformance: Token Revocation (RFC 7009) and Introspection (RFC 7662) Tests revocation behavior and introspection responses for active/revoked tokens.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Conformance.Tests.RevocationIntrospectionConformanceTests.#ctor(SimpleAuth.Conformance.Tests.ConformanceFixture)
member.summary: OIDC Conformance: Token Revocation (RFC 7009) and Introspection (RFC 7662) Tests revocation behavior and introspection responses for active/revoked tokens.

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.Conformance.Tests.TestHelpers
member.summary: Shared helpers for conformance tests.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Conformance.Tests.TestHelpers.Form(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a URL-encoded form content from key=value pairs.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Conformance.Tests.TestHelpers.GetQueryParam(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Extracts a query parameter from a redirect location URI.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Conformance.Tests.TestHelpers.ParseJsonAsync(System.Net.Http.HttpResponseMessage)
member.summary: Parses JSON response body.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Conformance.Tests.TestHelpers.AuthorizeRequest(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates an HTTP request with X-Test-User header for simulating logged-in user.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Conformance.Tests.TestHelpers.BasicAuth(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates an HTTP Basic auth header value.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Conformance.Tests.TestHelpers.GenerateCodeVerifier
member.summary: Generates a random PKCE code verifier.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Conformance.Tests.TestHelpers.ComputeS256Challenge(System.String)
member.summary: Computes S256 code challenge from verifier.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Conformance.Tests.TestHelpers.Base64UrlEncode(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte})
member.summary: Base64url-encodes bytes (no padding).

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Conformance.Tests.TestHelpers.Base64UrlDecode(System.String)
member.summary: Base64url-decodes a string.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Conformance.Tests.TestHelpers.DecodeJwtPayload(System.String)
member.summary: Decodes a JWT payload without signature verification (for test assertions).

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Conformance.Tests.TestHelpers.DecodeJwtHeader(System.String)
member.summary: Decodes a JWT header without signature verification.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Conformance.Tests.TestHelpers.CreateDPopProof(System.Security.Cryptography.ECDsa,System.Net.Http.HttpMethod,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a valid DPoP proof JWT.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Conformance.Tests.TestHelpers.ComputeAth(System.String)
member.summary: Computes the ath (access token hash) for a DPoP proof.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Conformance.Tests.TestHelpers.PerformAuthCodeFlowAsync(System.Net.Http.HttpClient,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Performs a full authorization code + PKCE flow and returns the token response JSON.

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.Conformance.Tests.TokenEndpointConformanceTests
member.summary: OIDC Conformance: Token Endpoint (OAuth 2.1 §4.1.3, RFC 6749 §5) Tests token exchange, grant types, client authentication methods, and error handling.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Conformance.Tests.TokenEndpointConformanceTests.#ctor(SimpleAuth.Conformance.Tests.ConformanceFixture)
member.summary: OIDC Conformance: Token Endpoint (OAuth 2.1 §4.1.3, RFC 6749 §5) Tests token exchange, grant types, client authentication methods, and error handling.

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.Conformance.Tests.UserInfoConformanceTests
member.summary: OIDC Conformance: UserInfo Endpoint (OIDC Core §5.3) Tests bearer token validation, claim responses, and error handling.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.Conformance.Tests.UserInfoConformanceTests.#ctor(SimpleAuth.Conformance.Tests.ConformanceFixture)
member.summary: OIDC Conformance: UserInfo Endpoint (OIDC Core §5.3) Tests bearer token validation, claim responses, and error handling.
